scripts.build: test -f ../kiosk-app/package.json || { echo 'ERROR: ../kiosk-app missing. Enable "Include source files outside of the Root Directory" in the Vercel project settings (under Root Directory).'; exit 1; }; npm --prefix ../kiosk-app ci && npm --prefix ../kiosk-app run build:embed && rm -rf dist && cp -r ../kiosk-app/dist dist
